name: Deciduous Green Tree
desc: The standard symbol for a leafy, lush tree. Perfect for content about parks, summer greenery, and environmental conservation.

name: Evergreen Pine Tree
desc: Represents hardy northern forests and Christmas traditions. Ideal for winter travel, hiking in the woods, and timber industry topics.

name: Tropical Palm Tree
desc: The universal icon for beaches and exotic travel. High SEO value for vacation planning, resort marketing, and summer vibes.

name: Desert Cactus Tree
desc: Represents arid environments and succulent plants. Great for Southwestern decor, drought-resistant gardening, and hot weather posts.

name: Tanabata Bamboo Tree
desc: A Japanese cultural symbol representing wishes and luck. Used for zen aesthetics, sustainable wood products, and Asian festivals.

name: Wood Tree Log
desc: Represents raw timber and firewood. Essential for carpentry, cozy cabin content, and outdoor survival skills.

name: Potted Plant Tree
desc: Symbolizes indoor gardening and houseplant care. Perfect for interior design blogs and urban jungle lifestyle content.

name: Autumn Tree Leaves
desc: Captures the beauty of falling leaves. Ideal for seasonal marketing, Thanksgiving themes, and cozy fall fashion updates.

name: Pine Tree Decoration
desc: Specifically for the Japanese Kadomatsu. Used for New Year celebrations and traditional natural decorations.

name: Old Growth Forest Tree
desc: A symbol for ancient woodlands and biodiversity. Used to emphasize environmental protection and deep nature roots.

name: Fruit From Tree
desc: Represents the harvest and productivity of orchard trees. Great for healthy eating and agricultural business content.

name: Tree Lined Houses
desc: A symbol for suburban living and green city planning. High value for real estate and urban development topics.
